title: Spatial Computing, 3D, XR, and AR Product Delivery
summary: Comprehensive proof for Joz's spatial computing capability across 3D web, XR/AR, volumetric UI, asset workflows, and immersive product delivery.
claims: Joz can design and build spatial products that combine immersive interaction, technical implementation, and narrative/product intent.
His spatial capability spans 3D web interfaces, XR/AR launch flows, volumetric UI, asset pipeline judgment, and multimodal interaction design.
He can position spatial computing as a usable business and product surface rather than only as visual experimentation.
proof_points: Designed and launched spatial AI with volumetric 3D UI for Versace/SOA in Dubai.
Pioneered spatial AI for world-class art exhibitions through ArtKorero.
Built Python USD(z) and computer-vision-adjacent workflows tied to Apple/Pixar-style pipelines.
The current app itself uses a portal-based 3D architecture with GLB assets, AR launch flows, spatial placement logic, semantic world modeling, and device-specific immersive behavior.
